title: Policy
description: A serializable policy definition. Describes a set of policy rules that can be persisted, distributed, or loaded from configuration. Each rule type corresponds to a concrete PolicyRule implementation in basis_core.policy.rules.

policy_id.description: Stable identifier for this policy definition. Treat as an external identifier — do not rename after the policy is deployed.

policy_type.description: The kind of policy this definition describes. Determines the expected structure of the rules array. 'role_policy' maps actions to permitted roles. 'resource_type_policy' constrains permitted resource types. 'action_policy' assigns explicit outcomes to named actions. 'composite_policy' combines multiple rule sets.

version.description: Version identifier. Appears in DecisionResponse.policy_version and AuditEvent.policy_version for correlation. Non-empty.

description.description: Human-readable description of this policy's purpose and the operational context it governs. Informational only.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this policy version was created or last modified. Must include timezone offset.

created_by.description: Identifier of the principal that created or last modified this policy. Used for policy change audit records.

evaluation_semantics.description: The aggregation semantics applied when multiple rules are present. Only 'deny_overrides' is supported: a DENY from any rule overrides any ALLOW; if all rules return NOT_APPLICABLE the default is DENY.

rules.description: Ordered list of policy rules. Structure depends on policy_type.

rule_type.description: The type of this rule. Determines which fields are relevant. 'role': action-to-roles mapping. 'resource_type': permitted resource type set. 'action': explicit action-to-outcome mapping.

action.description: For 'role' rules: the action name this rule governs. Must follow the '{verb}:{domain}[:{object}]' naming convention.

permitted_roles.description: For 'role' rules: role names permitted to perform this action. Non-empty items only.

permitted_resource_types.description: For 'resource_type' rules: resource type values that are permitted targets. Must match ResourceType enum values.

action_outcomes.description: For 'action' rules: map of action name to explicit outcome. Each key is an action name; each value is a PolicyOutcome string.
